slides.headline: Compress images locally
slides.subhead: Keep image compression on your Mac, with clear controls before work starts.

slides.headline: Drop files and go
slides.subhead: Add JPG, PNG, HEIC, or WebP images from Finder and start a local batch.

slides.headline: Watch every result
slides.subhead: Track each file, see saved space, and keep one failed image from stopping the batch.

slides.headline: Pick your desktop pet
slides.subhead: Choose a small Mac companion for status, focus, and a little compression feedback.
